next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Question asks amount made from service line 'buyer-language refinement memo' since beginning of Dec 2025 (interpreted as issued_on >= 2025-12-01). Exhaustiveness: searched invoices for exact double-space phrase (0) then normalized phrase (3 matches total), read all 3 matched invoices. Matching line_eur values by date: 2025-11-25 INV-0002 has 105 but excluded (before Dec 2025); 2025-12-23 INV-0003 has 105 included; 2026-03-20 INV-0005 has 180 included. Arithmetic: 105 + 180 = 285.
next_step.observation: All three matched invoice files were read and two qualify by issued_on date threshold.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and finance schema/rules, used exact line-item matching and summed line_eur values for qualifying dates.
function.outcome_justification: Service line appears in three invoice records; only invoices with issued_on on/after 2025-12-01 count. Included line_eur 105 (2025-12-23) and 180 (2026-03-20), totaling 285.
